verdict: Baebody's eye cream uniquely combines retinol with caffeine for depuffing and peptides for fine line reduction, addressing multiple eye-area concerns simultaneously. The specialized format and highest rating suggest strong real-world performance despite undisclosed retinol strength.

_research.name: Retinol Eye Cream
pros: Highest customer rating among all products
_research.con: Eye-specific pricing limits cost-effectiveness for full-face application.
